short_summary: El Niño confirmed, wildfire risk elevated
rationale: El Niño is now scientifically confirmed as active, directly elevating wildfire and drought risk for Portugal this season — the most tangible new development for a Portuguese resident this cycle.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active, directly raising wildfire, drought and extreme heat risk for the Iberian Peninsula — a concrete and immediate concern for Portuguese residents and the tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines leaves at least 37 dead
top_events.summary: Distant natural disaster with no direct relevance to Portugal; noted only as global background noise.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company
top_events.summary: US sanctions on Cuba have marginal indirect relevance via Atlantic trade and energy markets, but no significant impact on Portugal expected.
